title: Room Damages and Utilities Policy
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Room Damages and Utilities Policy
Any damages found in your room that were not indicated on your check-in form and that go beyond normal wear and tear will result in charges to your student account. All items provided in your room must remain in good working condition.
Fixed-Rate Charges
Item Charge (RMB)Chair 520Desk 1480Closet 2750Mattress Cover (Premium Single) 500Mattress Cover (Other Room Types) 50Water Kettle 69Wall Damage 870 per wallExcessive Trash Cleaning 690AC Remote Controller 20Cooktop 399Washer-Dryer 3099Water Purifier 2999Refrigerator 2099Microwave 299Trash Bin 38Drying Rack 136Stepping Stool 43Bunk Bed Rail 70Curtains 398Other Damages To be determined
Utilities Policy
Students are expected to use utilities (water, electricity, etc.) responsibly.
Utility usage should not exceed 30% above the average consumption rate in the Residence Hall.
Excessive consumption may result in additional charges and/or referral to the student conduct process.
